flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of New Mexico-Main Campus rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.2k → $33.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of New Mexico-Main Campus rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $10.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of New Mexico-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of New Mexico-Main Campus are 15% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($44.8k vs $39.1k).
